title: Chapter 2: The Answering Timeline
summary: A longer Chapter 2 route for players who finished Chapter 1 on the Fracture Path. Mira and Soren share impossible memories, but every remembered contradiction gives Lattice a new way to find them.
designNotes: Target 15 to 20 minutes for a first playthrough.
Carry forward memoryFracture, magicEntropy, and the exact Chapter 1 ending key.
Use prior choices to decide whether Mira begins with public suspicion, private doubt, or direct contact with Soren.
Cache this pack only when the player has earned fracture-path and is approaching Chapter 2.
